title: Spicy Vegan Sausage Wrap
description: A flavorful vegan wrap filled with spicy vegan sausage and sautéed vegetables. A perfect meal for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced vegan sausage and cook for 3-4 minutes, until browned.
Add the shredded lettuce, diced tomato, sliced onion, bell pepper, and cucumber to the skillet.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading hummus on the wrap, followed by the cooked vegan sausage and vegetables.
Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
Serve with additional hummus and sliced avocado on the side, if desired.
Cut the wrap in half and serve to 2 people.
Garnish with additional lettuce and tomato slices, if desired.
